_comment: Fetch MCP — lightweight URL fetch with HTML-to-Markdown conversion. No API key needed. Essential for reading documentation, Stack Overflow, blog posts, and any web page during research tasks.
_install: claude mcp add fetch -s user -- npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-fetch
_security: Read-only HTTP GET requests. No credentials sent. Respects robots.txt by default. Safe for general use.
